name: Forth Smart Service Public Company Limited
summary: Forth Smart Service Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides various top-up services for prepaid phones in Thailand. The company also offers receipt of other online services; and advertising services through online top-up machines, as well as rendering of service relating to online top-up machines. In addition, it offers nano finance and personal loan services. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand. Forth Smart Service Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Forth Corporation Public Company Limited.
